response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored video for dialogue and singing. Characters identify themselves in the dialogue section before the performance. 2. Since I cannot browse further to get the full lyrics, I have set the lyrics fields to null per the instructions if not found.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance segment featuring the Japanese VTuber group 'hololive 5th Generation' (also known as 'Nepolabo') performing their song 'Hitotsu ni Naru Koe'. The video begins with a short spoken dialogue section, followed by the musical performance.

scenes.description: The four VTuber characters engage in a conversation. Text identifying their names (Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka) appears in the bottom left as they speak. The scene ends at 01:33.
The four members of 'hololive 5th Generation' perform the song 'Hitotsu ni Naru Koe' on a 3D stage. Song credits are briefly shown on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka)
